# `components/Canvas/UI/SVGFilters.tsx`

## 📋 Purpose

Injects a hidden `<svg>` with filter definitions (e.g. feComponentTransfer) referenced by CSS filter properties on canvas layers.

> **Source file:** `src/components/Canvas/UI/SVGFilters.tsx`
